assertions.title: Restart reconciliation surfaces missing worktrees without recreation

steps.action: Run RestartReconciliation tests
steps.expected: All tests pass including missing worktree detection
steps.observed: 14 tests passed, 0 failed

steps.action: Verify test 'marks worktrees with non-existent paths as missing'
steps.expected: Test passes and validates path existence check
steps.observed: Test passed - validates path_not_exists reason and cleanup_failed status

steps.action: Verify test 'missing worktrees are surfaced without recreation'
steps.expected: Test passes and validates no git worktree recreation occurs
steps.observed: Test passed - worktree path still doesn't exist after reconciliation, marked as cleanup_failed

steps.action: Review reconcileWorktreesOnRestart implementation
steps.expected: Missing worktrees marked as cleanup_failed in persistence
steps.observed: Implementation calls worktreeRepository.updateWorktree() with status: 'cleanup_failed' and error message

steps.action: Verify valid worktrees remain active
steps.expected: Valid worktrees are returned in validWorktrees array
steps.observed: Valid worktrees with existing paths are included in validWorktrees result and not marked as missing

codeReferences: src/services/worktree/RestartReconciliation.test.ts:85-104 (marks worktrees with non-existent paths as missing)

assertions.title: Restart never leaves interrupted sessions appearing active

steps.action: Run recoverInterruptedSession tests
steps.expected: All non-terminal statuses converted to failed+recovered
steps.observed: All 7 recoverInterruptedSession tests passed

steps.action: Verify test 'converts queued status to failed recovered'
steps.expected: queued -> failed with recovered=true
steps.observed: Test passed - status: 'failed', recovered: true, error: 'Session interrupted by app restart'

steps.action: Verify test 'converts starting status to failed recovered'
steps.expected: starting -> failed with recovered=true
steps.observed: Test passed

steps.action: Verify test 'converts running status to failed recovered'
steps.expected: running -> failed with recovered=true
steps.observed: Test passed

steps.action: Verify test 'converts cancelling status to failed recovered'
steps.expected: cancelling -> failed with recovered=true
steps.observed: Test passed

steps.action: Verify terminal statuses are not changed
steps.expected: succeeded, failed, cancelled return null (no recovery needed)
steps.observed: All three tests passed - returns null for terminal states

steps.action: Review SessionManager.rehydrateFromPersistence implementation
steps.expected: Active states converted to failed/recovered during rehydration
steps.observed: Lines 1099-1107: explicit conversion of queued/starting/running/cancelling to failed with recovered=true and error message

assertions.title: Restart after lifecycle actions preserves valid current work

steps.action: Verify test 'handles mixed valid and missing worktrees'
steps.expected: Valid worktrees returned, missing worktrees marked as cleanup_failed
steps.observed: Test passed - valid worktree in validWorktrees array, missing worktrees in missingWorktrees array with cleanup_failed status

steps.action: Verify test 'excludes cleanup_failed worktrees from valid list on subsequent restarts'
steps.expected: Already cleanup_failed worktrees stay excluded from valid list
steps.observed: Test passed - worktree already in cleanup_failed state is not returned in validWorktrees on subsequent restart

steps.action: Verify removed worktrees are excluded from reconciliation
steps.expected: Worktrees with status='removed' are skipped entirely
steps.observed: Test 'excludes already removed worktrees from reconciliation' passed - removed worktrees not in valid or missing lists

steps.action: Verify archived worktrees with missing paths are handled
steps.expected: Archived worktrees with missing paths are marked as cleanup_failed
steps.observed: Confirmed in 'handles mixed valid and missing worktrees' test - archived worktree with missing path is marked as missing

steps.action: Verify deleted worktrees are not resurrected
steps.expected: Missing worktrees are not recreated, just marked as cleanup_failed
steps.observed: Test 'missing worktrees are surfaced without recreation' confirms path still doesn't exist after reconciliation

steps.action: Review repairSelection function in tree.ts
steps.expected: Selection repairs to valid node or safe empty state
steps.observed: repairSelection function exists at lines 171-204 with comprehensive logic for repairing invalid selections

steps.action: Verify test 'repairs to next worktree when selected worktree is removed'
steps.expected: Selection moves to valid worktree after deletion
steps.observed: Test passed - repaired selection has different valid worktree id

steps.action: Verify test 'repairs to empty state when all worktrees are deleted'
steps.expected: Selection cleared when no valid nodes remain
steps.observed: Test passed - selectedId and selectedType are null after repair

steps.action: Verify test 'maintains valid selection when unrelated worktree is deleted'
steps.expected: Valid selection unchanged when other nodes removed
steps.observed: Test passed - selection remains on sess-1 when wt-2 deleted

steps.action: Review App.tsx selection repair useEffect
steps.expected: Selection automatically repaired when worktrees/sessions change
steps.observed: useEffect at lines 162-177 calls repairSelection and updates state if selection changed

steps.action: Verify repairSelection called during rehydration flow
steps.expected: App repairs selection after worktrees loaded from persistence
steps.observed: App.tsx loads worktrees via reconcileWorktreesOnRestart, then useEffect repairs selection based on current tree

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 4 passed, 0 failed. All restart reconciliation assertions verified through automated test suite (191 total tests pass). VAL-LIFECYCLE-004 verified missing worktrees are surfaced as cleanup_failed without recreation. VAL-LIFECYCLE-006 verified interrupted sessions (queued/starting/running/cancelling) are converted to failed+recovered state. VAL-CROSS-003 verified valid worktrees remain active while missing/cleanup_failed/removed worktrees are properly excluded. VAL-CROSS-004 verified repairSelection correctly restores valid selection after rehydration.
